title: microcos latistipulata var. lanceolata
intro: Microcos latistipulata var. lanceolata, a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, is commonly known as the lance-leaved microcos or lance-leaved aster. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory infections. Microcos latistipulata var. lanceolata can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine.
